prompt: A watercolor illustration of a children's picture book cover. The main subject is a {argument name="character appearance" default="cute furry kemonomimi girl with short green hair, cat ears, and green eyes"}. She is {argument name="action" default="smiling happily while holding up her middle finger"} with a white-furred hand. She wears a green garment with a fluffy white collar. The background features soft, painted green foliage and small yellow flowers on textured paper. At the top, large hand-drawn green Japanese text reads "{argument name="main title" default="なかゆびさん"}". Below it, brown Japanese text reads "{argument name="subtitle" default="こんにちは"}". On the middle-left, smaller black text reads "{argument name="author text" default="さく・え：とらの"}". The image has a visible book spine on the left edge, emphasizing the physical book format.

breakdown.creativeCore: Watercolor Picture Book Cover：Generates a soft watercolor-style children's book cover featuring a cute character and customizable Japanese title text.
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: watercolor, hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
